name: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc.
description: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc. is a leading home, security, and commercial building products company. Headquartered in Deerfield, Illinois, the company operates with a focus on brand, innovation, and channel leadership. Its industry-leading brands include Moen, House of Rohl, Aqualisa, Therma-Tru, Larson, Fiberon, Master Lock, and SentrySafe. Fortune Brands focuses on high-growth categories such as water management, building products, and security, delivering innovative products and services to enhance the home and workplace.
